text: Natural language processing, or NLP, is a field of artificial intelligence that helps computers understand and work with human language. One common use is text understanding, where a computer can read a sentence and grasp its meaning. NLP also powers translation services, allowing instant conversion between languages. Sentiment analysis is another important application, used to determine if a text expresses positive, negative, or neutral feelings, for example in product reviews. Finally, chatbots rely on NLP to talk with users, answering questions or providing help in a natural way. These technologies are becoming more common in everyday life.
